MS.S: DSC resources for configuration of a Windows computer. These DSC resources allow you to perform computer management tasks, such as renaming the computer, joining a domain and scheduling tasks as well as configuring items such as virtual memory, event logs, time zones and power settings.
Copyright the DSC Community contributors. All rights reserved.

## [10.0.0] - 2025-01-25_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_### Added_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_- SystemProtection_x000D__x000A_ - New resource to configure System Protection settings (formerly xWindowsRestore) - Fixes [Issue #364](https://github.com/dsccommunity/ComputerManagementDsc/issues/364)._x000D__x000A_- SystemRestorePoint_x000D__x000A_ - New resource to create and delete restore points (formerly xSystemRestorePoint) - Fixes [Issue #364](https://github.com/dsccommunity/ComputerManagementDsc/issues/364)._x000D__x000A_- ScheduledTask_x000D__x000A_ - Added support for ScheduleType 'OnIdle', 'AtCreation', 'OnSessionState'._x000D__x000A_ Fixes [Issue #282](https://github.com/dsccommunity/ComputerManagementDsc/issues/282)._x000D__x000A_ - Added support for StateChange to allow specifying which session state changes should_x000D__x000A_ trigger the task (with ScheduleType = OnSessionState)._x000D__x000A_ - Added support for StopAtDurationEnd permitting control over the 'Stop all running tasks_x000D__x000A_ at the end of the repetition duration' feature._x000D__x000A_ Fixes [Issue #168](https://github.com/dsccommunity/ComputerManagementDsc/issues/168)._x000D__x000A_ - Added support for TriggerExecutionTimeLimit permitting control over per-trigger 'Stop task_x000D__x000A_ if it runs longer than...' feature._x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_### Fixed_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_- BREAKING CHANGE: ScheduledTask_x000D__x000A_ - Fixed SynchronizeAcrossTimeZone issue where Test always throws False when a date & time is used_x000D__x000A_ where Daylight Savings Time is in operation. Fixes [Issue #374](https://github.com/dsccommunity/ComputerManagementDsc/issues/374)._x000D__x000A_ - Fixed Test-DateStringContainsTimeZone to correctly process date strings behind UTC (-), as well_x000D__x000A_ as UTC Zulu 'Z' strings._x000D__x000A_ - Fixed User parameter to correctly return the user that triggers an AtLogon or OnSessionState_x000D__x000A_ Schedule Type, instead of the current value of ExecuteAsCredential. This parameter_x000D__x000A_ is only valid when using the AtLogon and OnSessionState Schedule Types._x000D__x000A_ - Fixed User parameter to permit use even if LogonType = Group._x000D__x000A_ - Updated RandomDelay logic from a blacklist to a whitelist._x000D__x000A_ - Updated Delay parameter logic to reflect other TimeSpan based values._x000D__x000A_ - Updated unit tests to use Should -Invoke for Pester 5 compatibility._x000D__x000A_ - Updated various parameters with requirements in documentation._x000D__x000A_- `VirtualMemory` fix incorrect variable name_x000D__x000A_- `SmbServerConfiguration` remove errant argument_x000D__x000A_- Update all calls to edit the registry so that the value Type is explicitly set._x000D__x000A_ Fixes [Issue #433](https://github.com/dsccommunity/ComputerManagementDsc/issues/433)._x000D__x000A_- Made AppVeyor use ModuleFast to resolve dependencies._x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_### Changed_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_- BREAKING CHANGE: ScheduledTask_x000D__x000A_ - StartTime has chnage the type from DateTime to String._x000D__x000A_ - StartTime is now processed on the device, rather than at compile time. This makes it possible_x000D__x000A_ to configure start times based on each device's timezone, rather than being fixed to the time zone_x000D__x000A_ configured on the device where the Desired State Configuration compilation was run._x000D__x000A_ - Allow StartTime to be used to set the 'Activate' setting when adding ScheduleType triggers_x000D__x000A_ other than 'Once', 'Daily' and 'Weekly'._x000D__x000A_ - Changed the default StartTime date from today to 1st January 1980 to prevent configuration flip flopping,_x000D__x000A_ and added note to configuration README to advise always supplying a date, and not just a time._x000D__x000A_ Fixes [Issue #148](https://github.com/dsccommunity/ComputerManagementDsc/issues/148)._x000D__x000A_ Fixes [Issue #411](https://github.com/dsccommunity/ComputerManagementDsc/issues/411)._x000D__x000A_ - Added examples & note to configuration README to supply a timezone when using SynchronizeAcrossTimeZone._x000D__x000A_ - Allow SynchronizeAcrossTimeZone to be used when adding ScheduleType triggers other than 'Once',_x000D__x000A_ 'Daily' and 'Weekly'._x000D__x000A_ - Updated Delay parameter to support ScheduleType AtLogon, AtStartup, AtCreation, OnSessionState._x000D__x000A_ Fixes [Issue #345](https://github.com/dsccommunity/ComputerManagementDsc/issues/345)._x000D__x000A_ - Updated User parameter for use with ScheduleType OnSessionState in addition to AtLogon._x000D__x000A_ - Updated integration tests to ensure resource and configuration names are matching._x000D__x000A_- Converted tests to Pester 5_x000D__x000A_- Rename Delete-ADSIObject to Delete-ADSIObject to satisfy HQRM_x000D__x000A_- No longer uses alias `New-InvalidArgumentException` but instead `New-ArgumentException`_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_### Removed_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_- Removed `Get-InvalidOperationRecord` to use version provided by `DscResource.Test`
Copyright the DSC Community contributors. All rights reserved.

DSC resources for configuration of a Windows computer. These DSC resources allow you to perform computer management tasks, such as renaming the computer, joining a domain and scheduling tasks as well as configuring items such as virtual memory, event logs, time zones and power settings.

## [10.0.0] - 2025-01-25_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_### Added_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_- SystemProtection_x000D__x000A_ - New resource to configure System Protection settings (formerly xWindowsRestore) - Fixes [Issue #364](https://github.com/dsccommunity/ComputerManagementDsc/issues/364)._x000D__x000A_- SystemRestorePoint_x000D__x000A_ - New resource to create and delete restore points (formerly xSystemRestorePoint) - Fixes [Issue #364](https://github.com/dsccommunity/ComputerManagementDsc/issues/364)._x000D__x000A_- ScheduledTask_x000D__x000A_ - Added support for ScheduleType 'OnIdle', 'AtCreation', 'OnSessionState'._x000D__x000A_ Fixes [Issue #282](https://github.com/dsccommunity/ComputerManagementDsc/issues/282)._x000D__x000A_ - Added support for StateChange to allow specifying which session state changes should_x000D__x000A_ trigger the task (with ScheduleType = OnSessionState)._x000D__x000A_ - Added support for StopAtDurationEnd permitting control over the 'Stop all running tasks_x000D__x000A_ at the end of the repetition duration' feature._x000D__x000A_ Fixes [Issue #168](https://github.com/dsccommunity/ComputerManagementDsc/issues/168)._x000D__x000A_ - Added support for TriggerExecutionTimeLimit permitting control over per-trigger 'Stop task_x000D__x000A_ if it runs longer than...' feature._x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_### Fixed_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_- BREAKING CHANGE: ScheduledTask_x000D__x000A_ - Fixed SynchronizeAcrossTimeZone issue where Test always throws False when a date & time is used_x000D__x000A_ where Daylight Savings Time is in operation. Fixes [Issue #374](https://github.com/dsccommunity/ComputerManagementDsc/issues/374)._x000D__x000A_ - Fixed Test-DateStringContainsTimeZone to correctly process date strings behind UTC (-), as well_x000D__x000A_ as UTC Zulu 'Z' strings._x000D__x000A_ - Fixed User parameter to correctly return the user that triggers an AtLogon or OnSessionState_x000D__x000A_ Schedule Type, instead of the current value of ExecuteAsCredential. This parameter_x000D__x000A_ is only valid when using the AtLogon and OnSessionState Schedule Types._x000D__x000A_ - Fixed User parameter to permit use even if LogonType = Group._x000D__x000A_ - Updated RandomDelay logic from a blacklist to a whitelist._x000D__x000A_ - Updated Delay parameter logic to reflect other TimeSpan based values._x000D__x000A_ - Updated unit tests to use Should -Invoke for Pester 5 compatibility._x000D__x000A_ - Updated various parameters with requirements in documentation._x000D__x000A_- `VirtualMemory` fix incorrect variable name_x000D__x000A_- `SmbServerConfiguration` remove errant argument_x000D__x000A_- Update all calls to edit the registry so that the value Type is explicitly set._x000D__x000A_ Fixes [Issue #433](https://github.com/dsccommunity/ComputerManagementDsc/issues/433)._x000D__x000A_- Made AppVeyor use ModuleFast to resolve dependencies._x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_### Changed_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_- BREAKING CHANGE: ScheduledTask_x000D__x000A_ - StartTime has chnage the type from DateTime to String._x000D__x000A_ - StartTime is now processed on the device, rather than at compile time. This makes it possible_x000D__x000A_ to configure start times based on each device's timezone, rather than being fixed to the time zone_x000D__x000A_ configured on the device where the Desired State Configuration compilation was run._x000D__x000A_ - Allow StartTime to be used to set the 'Activate' setting when adding ScheduleType triggers_x000D__x000A_ other than 'Once', 'Daily' and 'Weekly'._x000D__x000A_ - Changed the default StartTime date from today to 1st January 1980 to prevent configuration flip flopping,_x000D__x000A_ and added note to configuration README to advise always supplying a date, and not just a time._x000D__x000A_ Fixes [Issue #148](https://github.com/dsccommunity/ComputerManagementDsc/issues/148)._x000D__x000A_ Fixes [Issue #411](https://github.com/dsccommunity/ComputerManagementDsc/issues/411)._x000D__x000A_ - Added examples & note to configuration README to supply a timezone when using SynchronizeAcrossTimeZone._x000D__x000A_ - Allow SynchronizeAcrossTimeZone to be used when adding ScheduleType triggers other than 'Once',_x000D__x000A_ 'Daily' and 'Weekly'._x000D__x000A_ - Updated Delay parameter to support ScheduleType AtLogon, AtStartup, AtCreation, OnSessionState._x000D__x000A_ Fixes [Issue #345](https://github.com/dsccommunity/ComputerManagementDsc/issues/345)._x000D__x000A_ - Updated User parameter for use with ScheduleType OnSessionState in addition to AtLogon._x000D__x000A_ - Updated integration tests to ensure resource and configuration names are matching._x000D__x000A_- Converted tests to Pester 5_x000D__x000A_- Rename Delete-ADSIObject to Delete-ADSIObject to satisfy HQRM_x000D__x000A_- No longer uses alias `New-InvalidArgumentException` but instead `New-ArgumentException`_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_### Removed_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_- Removed `Get-InvalidOperationRecord` to use version provided by `DscResource.Test`

DesiredStateConfiguration DSC DSCResource PSModule PSDscResource_Computer PSDscResource_OfflineDomainJoin PSDscResource_PendingReboot PSDscResource_PowerPlan PSDscResource_PowerShellExecutionPolicy PSDscResource_RemoteDesktopAdmin PSDscResource_ScheduledTask PSDscResource_SmbServerConfiguration PSDscResource_SmbShare PSDscResource_SystemLocale PSDscResource_SystemProtection PSDscResource_SystemRestorePoint PSDscResource_TimeZone PSDscResource_VirtualMemory PSDscResource_WindowsEventLog PSDscResource_WindowsCapability PSDscResource_IEEnhancedSecurityConfiguration PSDscResource_UserAccountControl PSDscResource_PSResourceRepository PSIncludes_DscResource
